findings.evidence: Lines 99-103 `change ...; rw [AlgHom.mapValue_id]`. Mathlib has `CommAlgCat.hom_id` (Basic.lean:96 `(𝟙 A).hom = AlgHom.id R A`) and `GrpCat.ofHom_id` (Grp/Basic.lean:163).
findings.fix: Replace `change`/`rw` with explicit rewrites: `simp only [mapPoints, CommAlgCat.hom_id, AlgHom.mapValue_id, GrpCat.ofHom_id]` (all four lemmas exist), or document why `change` is unavoidable.
findings.issue: `mapPoints_id` uses `change` (no comment) to restate the goal, relying on the undocumented defeq `mapPoints (𝟙 A) ≡ GrpCat.ofHom (AlgHom.mapValue (𝟙 A).hom)`, `(𝟙 A).hom ≡ AlgHom.id R A`, and `𝟙 (points A) ≡ GrpCat.ofHom (MonoidHom.id ...)`. Brittle defeq across category wrappers; the rubric flags `change` without a documenting comment.

findings.evidence: Lines 106-110. `CommAlgCat.hom_comp` (Basic.lean:101 `(f ≫ g).hom = g.hom.comp f.hom`) and `GrpCat.ofHom_comp` (Grp/Basic.lean:166) supply both steps explicitly.
findings.fix: Use `simp only [mapPoints, CommAlgCat.hom_comp, AlgHom.mapValue_comp, GrpCat.ofHom_comp]`, or add a comment justifying `change`.
findings.issue: `mapPoints_comp` uses the same undocumented `change`, resting on `(φ ≫ ψ).hom ≡ ψ.hom.comp φ.hom` and `GrpCat.ofHom (g.comp f) ≡ GrpCat.ofHom g ≫ GrpCat.ofHom f`. Undocumented cross-wrapper defeq.

summary: Two functoriality proofs use an undocumented `change` that rewrites the goal into `GrpCat.ofHom (...)` form, relying on definitional equality across the CommAlgCat/GrpCat wrappers without a comment. Mathlib provides exact lemmas for those steps; use them instead.
